title: Frequently Asked Questions
seoTitle: Game of Darts FAQ | BarkinMad Studios
description: Answers to common Game of Darts questions about modes, DartBot, statistics, Game Center, caller voices, premium access, and artwork status.
summary: Quick support answers for Game of Darts players and documentation reviewers.
heroImageAlt: Placeholder artwork for pending Game of Darts FAQ image
sourceNotes: FAQ combines website metadata, in-app help copy, and central source-backed Game of Darts documentation.

sections.heading: FAQ overview
paragraphs: This page collects short answers for common Game of Darts support and documentation questions.
Where source documentation marks behavior To Verify, the answer keeps that limitation visible.

faq.question: Is Game of Darts available on the App Store?
faq.answer: Yes. The website metadata marks Game of Darts as Live and includes the public App Store link.

faq.question: Which modes are release-facing?
faq.answer: Central documentation identifies Match/X01, Cricket, Snooker, Bob's 27, 1 to 20, Hare & Hound, Halve It, and All 5s as live release-facing modes.

faq.question: Does Game of Darts support DartBot?
faq.answer: Yes. DartBot is documented for Match play and is gated by Pro, DartBot-only unlock, 48-hour access, or development access.

faq.question: Do leaderboards and achievements require Game Center?
faq.answer: Yes. In-app help states leaderboards and achievements require Game Center sign-in.

faq.question: Does Game of Darts use BarkinMad Coins?
faq.answer: No verified BarkinMad Coins usage was found in the central Game of Darts docs for this rollout. Premium access is documented through Pro, DartBot, 48-hour access, and ad-supported play.

faq.question: Why do several pages use placeholder artwork?
faq.answer: Only a small Game of Darts artwork set is currently available in the website repository. Pages without dedicated screenshots use the Website Framework placeholder until real artwork is produced.
